name: @jeswr/solid-granary
description: granary (snarfed/granary, CC0) → Solid pod. A THIN adapter that maps granary's ActivityStreams 2.0 output (format=as2 — FB/IG/Twitter/Mastodon/Bluesky/Nostr/Farcaster/GitHub/Flickr + RSS/Atom/JSON-Feed/mf2) to the suite's canonical chat message model (@jeswr/solid-chat-interop) and writes each as an owner-private pod resource. Handles a single AS2 object or an AS2 Collection of items; untrusted IRIs filtered http(s)-only; optional SSRF-guarded fetch-from-granary helper. Pure-RDF, non-server-touching, typed accessors only.
author: Jesse Wright

scripts.lint: biome check src test scripts && npm run check:lockfile-transport
scripts.gate: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run check:dist && npm run check:lockfile-transport
